creator: pav@FreeBSD.org
text:
Dear maintainer of FreeBSD port devel/kdbg, please take a look at

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=104271

Can you work with the submitter on resolving the issue?

-- 
Pav Lucistnik <pav@oook.cz>
              <pav@FreeBSD.org>

An arrow (+0,+0) {@f0} finds a mark. It dies.
